project.objective: Establish the maiden surname of Ellen (wife of Michael Doyle), whose surname is illegible on their 1889 Dubuque County, Iowa marriage certificate.

questions.question: What was the maiden surname of Ellen (b. ~1868), who married Michael Doyle on 12 June 1889 in Dubuque, Dubuque County, Iowa? Her surname is illegible on the marriage certificate.
questions.rationale: The 1889 marriage certificate is the only record gathered so far, and the bride's surname is illegible in the register image. Her maiden surname is needed to trace her origin family.

exhaustive_declaration.justification: The 1889 Dubuque County marriage certificate was located and examined; the bride's given name is legible but her maiden surname is illegible in the register image. Declared exhaustive on the basis that the certificate is the record of the event.

stop_criteria.goal_alignment: Partial — the marriage event is documented, but the bride's maiden surname (the question's target) remains unresolved.
stop_criteria.repository_breadth: Only FamilySearch searched, for the marriage record only.
stop_criteria.original_substitution: The marriage certificate is an original; its surname field is illegible.
stop_criteria.independent_verification: None — the maiden surname rests on a single illegible record.
stop_criteria.evidence_class: Direct for the marriage event; the maiden surname is unresolved.
stop_criteria.overturn_risk: High for the maiden surname — it is illegible and uncorroborated.

items.rationale: The county marriage record for Michael Doyle and Ellen should state the bride's maiden surname and her parents.

log.notes: Dubuque County marriage certificate, 12 June 1889: groom Michael Doyle; bride 'Ellen' — surname illegible in the register image (clerk's hand + fading). Bride's parents' names also illegible. This is the only record gathered so far.

sources.citation: Dubuque County, Iowa, marriage certificate, Michael Doyle and Ellen [surname illegible], 12 June 1889; Dubuque County Recorder, digital image, FamilySearch.

citation_detail.where_within: Marriage certificate, Michael Doyle and Ellen, 12 June 1889

sources.notes: Bride's given name 'Ellen' is clear; her surname and her parents' names are illegible in the register image.

assertions.informant: The bride and groom, reporting to the county recorder
assertions.informant_bias_notes: Bride's given name 'Ellen' is legible; her maiden surname is illegible in the register image (transcription/OCR ambiguity). The maiden surname is unresolved from this record alone.

assertions.value: Married Michael Doyle on 12 June 1889 in Dubuque, Dubuque County, Iowa
assertions.place: Dubuque, Dubuque County, Iowa, United States

person_evidence.rationale: The bride 'Ellen' on the 1889 Doyle marriage is the subject Ellen Doyle; only her maiden surname is unresolved.
